name: Dynamix Corp III
summary: PART I General We are a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands (the Company) on June 20, 2025 formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (the initial business combination).
